description: Determines the primary focus or theme for a cyberpunk dystopia setting.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the primary focus or theme for a cyberpunk dystopia setting.

entries.result: Mega-Corps: The setting is dominated by powerful corporations

resultTranslations.en: Mega-Corps: The setting is dominated by powerful corporations

entries.result: AI Dominance: Artificial intelligence is at the top of the social hierarchy, controlling all

resultTranslations.en: AI Dominance: Artificial intelligence is at the top of the social hierarchy, controlling all

entries.result: Military: The setting is heavily military focused; perhaps there is a war going on

resultTranslations.en: Military: The setting is heavily military focused; perhaps there is a war going on

entries.result: Robots Rising: Robotic or synthetic life is common and becoming an issue with humans

resultTranslations.en: Robots Rising: Robotic or synthetic life is common and becoming an issue with humans

entries.result: Drugs: It's not just cyber technology but high tech enhancement drugs that are sought by many

resultTranslations.en: Drugs: It's not just cyber technology but high tech enhancement drugs that are sought by many

entries.result: Aliens: The setting includes the presence of aliens who have visited Earth, bringing tech and trouble

resultTranslations.en: Aliens: The setting includes the presence of aliens who have visited Earth, bringing tech and trouble

entries.result: Post-Apocalypse: The world has either fallen or effectively has. This is a place of chaos and little order

resultTranslations.en: Post-Apocalypse: The world has either fallen or effectively has. This is a place of chaos and little order

entries.result: Spy Thriller: The focus of cybertechnology is on espionage and the creation of super spies

resultTranslations.en: Spy Thriller: The focus of cybertechnology is on espionage and the creation of super spies

entries.result: Investigative: The Player Character is an investigator of some sort, whether private or law enforcement

resultTranslations.en: Investigative: The Player Character is an investigator of some sort, whether private or law enforcement

entries.result: No Focus: Roll on the Cyber Dystopia World Meaning table without additional Context from this table

resultTranslations.en: No Focus: Roll on the Cyber Dystopia World Meaning table without additional Context from this table
